turns.content: yo so the bruins are playin the leafs saturday and me and the boys are tryna figure out where to watch it
Nice, Bruins-Leafs is always a solid matchup. Are you looking for a good sports bar to watch at, or more of a house party setup?
my boy Sully has a spot in southie with a big tv so were probably gonna just go there honestly bars get wicked packed for bruins games and half the time you cant even hear the announcers

Yeah, watching at a buddy's place is the move for a game like that. Way more comfortable, you can actually hear the play-by-play, and you save a ton not paying bar prices. Are you guys doing food too or just drinks?
were gonna order some pizzas probably from santarpios and im gonna swing by the packie and grab a couple 30 racks of bud light thats all I drink bro I dont mess with anything else

Santarpio's is a great call for pizza, you really can't go wrong there. And hey, Bud Light gets the job done -- sometimes you just know what you like and stick with it. A couple 30 racks should have you guys set for the night. How many people coming?
probably like 8 or 9 dudes so were gonna need it lol me danny sully couple guys from work and maybe my cousin tommy if he can get out of his wifes thing

That's a solid crew for a hockey night. Two 30 racks for 8-9 guys should be plenty, that's like 7 beers each if you split it evenly. Your cousin Tommy might need a good excuse to get out of that one though haha.
haha yeah hes always tryna sneak away from somethin bro his wife plans stuff every saturday I swear she does it on purpose to keep him away from the boys
Classic move honestly. Some people just have a sixth sense for scheduling things right when the game is on. Hopefully he can make it work though -- Bruins-Leafs with the full crew hits different.
facts bro the leafs are so easy to chirp too their fans are unreal like bro you havent won a cup since 67 sit down

The 1967 thing is the gift that keeps on giving for chirps. Leafs fans talk a big game every single year and then it all falls apart in the playoffs. At least they're consistent with the disappointment. Should be a fun one to watch with the boys.
dude im tellin you if pastrnak keeps playin like hes been playin we got a real shot this year kid is on another level rn

Pastrnak has been absolutely electric this season, his shot is just lethal right now. If he stays healthy and keeps producing at this pace, the Bruins are definitely a serious contender. He's one of those guys who can just take over a game when he's feeling it.
no cap bro alright I gotta go pick up the bud lights before the packie gets cleaned out on friday everyone stocks up before a saturday game
Smart thinking, get there early before the shelves are empty. Enjoy the game Saturday -- Bruins-Leafs with the boys, Santarpio's pizza, and plenty of Bud Light sounds like a perfect setup. Go B's!
